title: Rtellis
compiled_truth: Rtellis is an external contact at [Milbank](companies/milbank). Over the corpus period (1999-12-13 to 2001-06-10), Rtellis sent 16 and received 39 emails, totalling 55 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard B Sanders](people/richard-b-sanders) (16), [Showard](people/showard-milbank) (9), [Richard Smith](people/richard-smith-linklaters) (3), [Lmellen](people/lmellen) (3), [Lisa Mellencamp](people/lisa-mellencamp) (1).
